series_metadata.series_description: Files contain documentation concerning school districts under the fiscal oversight status of Fiscal Emergency. Files may include requests for solvency assistance, repayment schedules, financial forecasts by the Auditor of State's office, correspondence, and all Financial Supervision and Planning Commission materials (including financial recovery plans and addendums, meeting agenda's, resolutions passed, meeting minutes, and monitoring reports, etc.), and release documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: All records will be retained during fiscal emergency period. Upon release from fiscal emergency and disbanding of commission, records will be transferred from Ohio Department of Education Auditor of State as pursuant ORC 3316.16(C). ; Paper: All records will be retained during fiscal emergency period. Upon release from fiscal emergency and disbanding of commission, records will be transferred from Ohio Department of Education Auditor of State as pursuant ORC 3316.16(C)
